notes: LLM image review was completed for sample1-6 declared subset via vision agents.
The vision verdicts are stricter than the pixel-diff threshold and still flag major template-semantic gaps on several slides.
This wave therefore remains in iterate mode from the LLM-visual-fidelity perspective.

Split blue/photo template family matches, but the bracket frame and title area are materially incorrect.

Yellow title-slide category matches, but rocket/cloud composition and typography hierarchy are fundamentally wrong.

Layout is close, but iconography and some decorative/background details still differ too much.
